ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy meter or sensor */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts measured */,
  "volts" REAL /* Volts measured */,
  "amps" REAL /* Amps measured */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor measured */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or label for the data point */,
  "energy_type" TEXT /* Type of energy consumption */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of energy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter or sensor */,
  "meter_name" TEXT /* Name of the meter or sensor */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of the meter or sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meter or sensor */,
  "meter_model" TEXT /* Model of the meter */,
  "meter_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the meter */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "calibration_due_date" TEXT /* Date of next calibration due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "budget" REAL /* Energy budget for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "target_watts" REAL /* Target watts */,
  "target_volts" REAL /* Target volts */,
  "target_amps" REAL /* Target amps */,
  "target_pf" REAL /* Target power factor */,
  "target_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the target period */,
  "target_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the target period */,
  "target_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage data point */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "watts" REAL /* Watts used */,
  "volts" REAL /* Volts used */,
  "amps" REAL /* Amps used */,
  "pf" REAL /* Power factor used */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the usage data point */,
  "usage_category" TEXT /* Category of energy usage */,
  "usage_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of energy usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used for analytics */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics was performed */,
  "analytics_result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
